name: auto-rollback
description: Safe config-change safety net for openclaw.json (backup + timed rollback + health-check auto-cancel)
author: Bagel
releaseNotes: v1.2.0 - CRITICAL FIX: (1) auto-rollback.sh now checks Gateway health before executing rollback, preventing false rollbacks; (2) BOOT.md improved to wait 30s for Gateway health check before cancelling rollback; (3) Added curl requirement for health endpoint checks; (4) Documented correct restart methods (openclaw gateway restart or gateway.config.apply, NOT gateway.restart SIGUSR1)
